content: shadcn/ui is the dominant React component library for 2025. Not a npm package but a CLI-based copy-paste system: components are brought into the project source (no black-box dependency). Built on Radix UI primitives (accessible) + Tailwind CSS. Fully supports Tailwind v4 and React 19. Provides: Table (for inventory lists), Form, Dialog, Select, Badge, Card, Sheet — all needed for a logistics MIS. 331+ free templates at shadcn.io. Dashboard admin templates widely available (shadcnuikit.com).
